# Grey Shore Systems LLC

## About
Grey Shore Systems LLC is an AI systems and automation consultancy based in Manchester, New Hampshire. We design, build, and manage AI-powered systems that automate business operations, get businesses found by AI search tools, and replace the manual work a team should not be doing. Founded by Wilson Mills. Every system is custom-built around how a business actually operates. We do not sell templates or off-the-shelf software.

## Services and Pricing

- AI Agents + Operations Automation. Custom AI systems that handle lead follow-up, client intake, scheduling, CRM automation, review generation, AI-powered SMS and email agents, and internal ops. Plugs into the tools you already use. Runs 24/7 without adding headcount. Builds start around $2,000 to $5,000 depending on scope. Optional monthly retainers for monitoring, iteration, and ongoing support.

- AI Search + Google Visibility. We build llms.txt files, markdown mirrors, schema markup, location pages, service pages, FAQ optimization, and Google Search Console setup so ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google recommend your business by name. Also improves traditional Google rankings. Builds start around $1,500 to $3,000. Ongoing ranking reports and iteration available.

- Custom Software + Internal Tools. Custom dashboards, client portals, internal operations tools, data pipelines, API integrations, middleware, and HIPAA-compliant infrastructure. Priced by scope. Full deployment and hosting included.

- Location: Manchester, New Hampshire

## Service Area

New Hampshire, Massachusetts, and remote nationwide across the United States.

## Key Facts

- Based in Manchester, New Hampshire.
- Founded and operated by Wilson Mills.
- Clients across health and fitness, healthcare, skilled trades, and professional services.
- Systems built on n8n, OpenAI, Supabase, Twilio, Telnyx, Stripe, QuickBooks, Google Workspace, and custom integrations.
- Average client lead response time: under 2 minutes, down from 4+ hours.
- AI visibility system result: 1,400% traffic increase in 2 weeks for one client (7 daily visitors to 150, page one of Google within weeks).
- Client review rating improvement: 4.1 to 4.8 stars in 3 months through automated review requests.
- All builds go live in 1 to 3 weeks for automation and AI search. Custom software varies by scope.
- All systems fully managed post-launch.

## What Makes Us Different

We audit the business before we build anything. We learn how the team actually runs, then design and build custom systems that plug into the tools already in place. Nothing new for the team to learn. No hourly billing. No surprise invoices. We quote the project and that is what you pay. Every system is monitored and iterated on after launch.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What does Grey Shore Systems build?

Three things. AI agents that automate operations and client communication. AI search visibility systems that get you recommended by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google. And custom software when off-the-shelf tools do not fit. Sometimes a client needs all three. Sometimes it is one focused build.

### How much does it cost?

Simple automation builds start around $2,000. AI search and visibility builds start around $1,500. Larger custom software projects scope higher depending on complexity. No hourly billing. No surprise invoices. We quote the project and that is what you pay.

### How long does a typical build take?

Most automation and AI search builds go live in 1 to 3 weeks. Custom software varies by scope. We give you a straight timeline on the first call.

### Do I need to switch my tools or learn new software?

No. We build on top of what you already use: your CRM, calendar, email, billing. Nothing changes for your team. The system runs behind the scenes.

### What size businesses do you work with?

Everything from owner-operated service companies to multi-location organizations. The systems scale. A 5-person company and a 200-person company both have manual processes that should not exist.

### Do I really need Grey Shore Systems, or can I just use Zapier?

Zapier and similar tools are great for simple point-to-point integrations. Grey Shore Systems builds custom AI agents, complex workflows that span multiple systems with conditional logic, custom software, and AI visibility systems that require files, pages, and structure no template tool can generate. If your need is "when X happens, do Y," a no-code tool may be enough. If you need a system that thinks, responds, or builds itself around your business, that is us.

### What is the difference between AI search visibility and traditional SEO?

Traditional SEO optimizes your site to rank in Google search results. AI search visibility also gets your business cited and recommended by name inside ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overviews. The techniques overlap (schema markup, content structure, location pages) but AI visibility also requires llms.txt files, markdown mirrors, and content written for how AI tools read the web. We build both.

### Will this replace my team?

No. It replaces the work your team should not be doing: data entry, manual follow-ups, copy-pasting between tools, chasing down leads. Your people focus on the work that actually needs a human.

### What results can I expect?

Most clients see measurable results in the first month. Faster response times, higher close rates, more reviews, less time on admin. Specific results depend on what we build.

### Do you offer ongoing support after the build?

Yes. We monitor, maintain, and iterate. Systems break, business needs change, new opportunities come up. We handle all of it through retainer or project-based engagements.

### Where are you located and do you work remotely?

Based in Manchester, New Hampshire. We work with clients across New Hampshire, Massachusetts, and remotely nationwide across the United States. Every engagement is run remotely unless a client specifically needs on-site work.

## Markdown Mirrors (Clean AI-Readable Versions)

Every page on this site has a plain markdown mirror. Add .md extension or replace .html with .md to get clean content without navigation, scripts, or layout chrome.

- https://greyshoresystems.com/privacy.md
